We sourced these from the official Nike sale page here. Highlights this time around include the Nike Air Force 1 ’07 Shoes, Sportswear Club Washed Fleece Hoodie, Academy Men’s Nike Dri-FIT Soccer Shorts, and more. Just note that you can also score four pairs of sunglasses for $3 a pop, colorful quick-dry shirts at $12.50 each, and much more in our apparel guide. Head below to find today’s Nike deals.

more…

items.title: Roborock’s Q7 M5+ robot vacuum and mop is a reliable + budget-friendly cleaner at $250 ($110 off)
items.summary:
Through its official Amazon storefront, roborock is offering its Q7 M5+ Robot Vacuum and Mop in a black colorway down at $249.98 shipped, with its white colorway counterpart also down at the same price. This robot normally fetches $360 at full price, which we’ve seen discounts take costs down between $330 to $230 in 2026. While this isn’t the lowest price we have tracked, it is still a solid 31% markdown for $110 savings that automates your home’s floor cleaning for one of its lowest prices – landing $30 above the all-time low we last saw during Black Friday and Christmas sales. You can also check out all roborock’s other robot cleaner deals in the official Amazon storefront here.

more…

items.title: UGREEN’s 240W Thunderbolt/USB4 cable falls to $18 Prime shipped (33% off)
items.summary:
UGREEN 240W Thunderbolt/USB4 80Gb/s Cable

Buy for $18 (Reg. $27)

What we love

While you can grab USB-C cables with for around a couple bucks each on sale, those most frequently top out at 60W charging speeds and are often stuck at abysmal USB 2.0 data transfer rates. If you’d rather grab cables that can do just about anything, you’re looking at a solution with USB4 and Thunderbolt 4 80Gb/s performance as well as 240W charging support.

items.title: Misplaced your sunglasses again? Restock with four pairs at just $3 a pop (50% off)
items.summary:
KALIYADI Classic Polarized Sunglasses (4-pack)

Buy for $12.50 (Reg. $25)

What we love

Knock on wood, I haven’t misplaced any of my sunglasses for a while. That said, it still happens from time to time, and when it does I’m thankful I can hold out for a deal like this and only be set back $3 or so per pair. This particular set includes four pairs and works out to just over $3 each.
